title: Sport
description: Top-level sport in the platform catalog. Carries `tenant_id` NULLABLE — NULL = platform-scoped (visible to every tenant), non-null = tenant custom (Enterprise-only). NEVER `application_id` (the catalog crosses applications), NEVER `region_id`, NEVER `branch_id`, NEVER `organization_id`, NEVER `scope_node_id` (registry is a scope-node entity, not a scope consumer), NEVER `parent_id` (the tree is Sport → Discipline → Position via typed FK columns, not self-referential). `slug` is IMMUTABLE post-create — downstream Wave 3 rows carry the slug as a string. `is_platform_seeded` is IMMUTABLE. `tenant_id` is IMMUTABLE.

x-eloquent.relations_note: hasMany disciplines::Discipline via disciplines.sport_id (RESTRICT). belongsTo tenancy::Tenant via tenant_id (CASCADE, nullable — NULL = platform-scoped).

x-database.description: One first-party table. Composite scoping via (tenant_id NULL for platform, slug) unique. Partial unique index enforces slug uniqueness within the scoping tuple.

tenant_id.description: The tenant that owns this Sport, OR NULL for platform-seeded rows. CASCADE aligns with tenancy's TenantErased contract. Platform-seeded rows survive tenant erasure (they carry tenant_id NULL — no owner).

name.description: Display name (e.g. 'Football', 'Basketball', 'Swimming', 'Yoga', 'General Fitness'). Localizable via HasTranslations.

slug.description: URL-safe identifier. Regex `^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$`. IMMUTABLE post-create. Reserved: platform, system, admin, seeded, default, any, all. Unique per (tenant_id, slug) partial WHERE deleted_at IS NULL.

category.description: Enum: team_sport / individual_sport / racquet / combat / aquatic / winter / cycling / track_field / fitness / recreational.

governing_body.description: Official governing body (FIFA / FIBA / FINA / World Rugby / ICC / …). Editorial + optional.

gender_typical.description: Enum: male_only / female_only / mixed / any. Advisory — shapes tenant UI (a male-only sport hides female options in the picker) but does NOT enforce eligibility at the write path (downstream Athlete modules handle enforcement).

age_range_min.description: Advisory lower age bound (3-99). Shapes downstream AgeGroup admin UI. Not enforced on write.

primary_color.description: CSS hex color (#RGB or #RRGGBB). Used for the sport chip in the tenant UI.

icon.description: Iconify identifier (`mdi:soccer`, `game-icons:basketball-ball`). Regex: `^[a-z0-9-]+:[a-z0-9-]+$`. Rendered by the frontend via Iconify.

sort_order.description: Ascending sort in the tenant picker. Category groups sort first; sort_order within category second.

is_active.description: False = deactivated (hidden from tenant picker). Historical downstream references still resolve via SportKeyResolver. Deactivation is the standard 'delete' path — hard-delete is rare + refuses for platform-seeded rows.

is_platform_seeded.description: True when the row was created by SportCatalogSeeder from data/platform-sports-catalog.json. IMMUTABLE — set once + never mutated. Platform-seeded rows have tenant_id NULL + are visible to every tenant + cannot be hard-deleted.

metadata.description: Free-form metadata (from HasMetadata trait). Never exposed on the wire without `?include=metadata`.

indexes.name: sports_scope_slug_unique
indexes.description: One live slug per scoping tuple. Platform-scoped (tenant_id IS NULL) + tenant customs (tenant_id = X) share the same partial-unique behaviour. Slug collision between platform + tenant is caught by the observer (SPORT_KEY_COLLIDES_WITH_PLATFORM); this index is the DB-level guard.

indexes.name: sports_picker_idx
indexes.description: Fast scan for the tenant picker (order by category asc, sort_order asc).

downstream_reference_count.description: Computed. Count of Wave 3 rows across every table in reconciler config that reference this Sport's slug. Included on show responses; suppressed on list responses unless explicitly requested.

discipline_count.description: Computed. Count of active Discipline children under this Sport.

accepts: slug (case-insensitive within the caller's merged catalog — platform + own tenant customs)

invariants: slug matches `^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$` AND is not in the reserved list.
category is one of the 10 enum values.
gender_typical is one of the 4 enum values.
age_range_min <= age_range_max when both set; each in 3..99 (INVALID_AGE_RANGE).
Tenant custom rows (is_platform_seeded=false) cannot shadow platform slugs (SPORT_KEY_COLLIDES_WITH_PLATFORM 422).
Deactivation refuses when active Disciplines exist (SPORT_HAS_ACTIVE_DISCIPLINES 409) unless cascade=true.
Deactivation refuses when downstream Wave 3 references exist (SPORT_REFERENCE_IN_USE 409).
Non-seeded (is_platform_seeded=false) rows count against `sports_registry_custom_slot` entitlement; seeded rows do NOT.
